languages.text: {n}Если сервочереп вас и услышал, он не показывает вида.{/n}
{n}If the servo-skull has heard you, it makes no sign of it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}サーボスカルがあなたを聞いたなら、それを示す兆候は何もありません。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}If the servo-skull has heard you, it makes no sign of it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Dem Servoschädel ist nicht anzumerken, ob er dich gehört hat.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}If the servo-skull has heard you, it makes no sign of it.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Si el servocráneo te ha oído, no hace nada por demostrarlo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Hizmelet seni duysa da bunu belli eden hiçbir harekette bulunmuyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Le servocrâne ne montre aucun signe de vous avoir {mf|entendu|entendue}.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Le servocrâne ne montre aucun signe de vous avoir {mf|entendu|entendue}.{/n}

languages.text: {n}你不知道那伺服头骨是否听到了你的话，但不管怎样，它未对你的话作任何表示。{/n}
